error.title: Couldn't reach durin
error.gatewayHint: Make sure the gateway is running (`durin gateway`) and that this page is open on the same machine.

auth.title: Authentication required
auth.hint: Enter the secret configured as tokenIssueSecret in your gateway config.

account.logoutHint: Disconnect this browser from the gateway.

system.restartHint: Restart durin to apply runtime changes.

meta.description: durin web UI — chat with your durin workspace.

help.theme: Switch between light and dark appearance.
help.palette: durin's colour identity — Ithildin, Forge, or Mithril.
help.language: Choose the language used by the WebUI.
help.provider: Select the provider that should serve new model requests.
help.model: Set the default model name used by durin.
help.configPath: The gateway configuration file currently in use.

byok.description: Bring your own provider keys. durin reads these values from the current config and only configured providers can be selected in General.
byok.webSearchDescription: Configure the web search provider and its credential. This only affects the web search tool.
byok.apiKeyConfiguredPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current key
byok.apiKeyRequired: API key is required to configure this provider.
byok.configureFirst: Configure a provider in BYOK first.

webSearch.providerHelp: Choose the backend used by the web search tool.
webSearch.noCredentialHelp: DuckDuckGo works without a saved API key.
webSearch.apiKeyHelp: Stored in config and masked after saving.
webSearch.baseUrlHelp: SearXNG needs the URL of your own instance.
webSearch.apiKeyRequired: API key is required for this search provider.
webSearch.baseUrlRequired: Base URL is required for SearXNG.
webSearch.missingCredential: Add the required credential before saving.
webSearch.saveHint: Changes apply to new web search requests.

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.description: API keys and tokens, stored in ~/.durin/secrets.json (mode 0600), outside config.json. Values are never shown here.
secrets.hintName: UPPER_SNAKE — also the environment variable name in exec.
secrets.hintService: What the secret is for, e.g. atlassian or provider:openai.
secrets.hintScope: Comma-separated consumer tags: exec, skill:*, channel:telegram.
secrets.hintValue: Leave blank when editing to keep the stored value.
secrets.hintValueEdit: Leave blank to keep the current value. Provide a new value only when rotating the secret.

config.description: Every durin setting, grouped by section. Editing a value writes it straight to the config — the same as durin config set. Lists and managed secrets are read-only here.
config.secretRotateHint: Write a new value to the stored secret. All config refs pointing to this name will use it.
config.secretDisconnectHint: Replace this ref with a plaintext input. The secret stays in the store, only this field is severed.
config.secretRotateDescription: Replace the value stored for {{name}}. Every config field that references ${secret:{{name}}} will pick this up immediately. The value never leaves the secret store and never enters the chat.

models.auxDescription: durin uses these only when the main model can't handle images or audio itself.
models.memoryHint: Used by memory_search query rewriting. Falls back to the main model when unset.
models.testHint: Run a real round-trip against the configured model.
models.loadError: Could not load the model configuration.
models.capsUnknown: Pick a model to see what it supports.
models.testRowHint: Real round-trip to the configured model — verifies the API key and model id work together.
models.contextWindowHint: Max input tokens fed to the model per turn. Defaults to the model catalog value.
models.temperatureHint: Sampling temperature in [0, 2]. Lower = more deterministic.
models.maxTokensHint: Cap per assistant message. Bounded by the model.
models.reasoningEffortHint: For reasoning models: low | medium | high. Leave blank for default.

channels.description: Bridge durin to chat platforms. Enable a channel and set its credential — the token goes to the secret store, not config.json.

memory.description: Tune the memory subsystem — search reranking and dream auto-consolidation.

help.crossEncoderEnabled: Opt-in second-pass reranker. Adds 300-1500 ms per query and ~1 GB RAM but improves quality on ambiguous queries. Off by default.
help.crossEncoderModel: Model used when the reranker is enabled. The default works well for multilingual queries; alternatives trade size for latency.
help.dreamEnabled: Master switch for the automatic dream. When off, the cron and reactive triggers are disabled; the manual `durin memory dream` still works.
help.dreamCron: Cron expression for the daily extract / refine / skill pass. Default 0 3 * * * (3am local).
help.dreamPostCompaction: Run a dream pass after a session is compacted — the context is already in memory so the cost is amortised.
help.dreamOnSessionClose: Run a dream pass when a session ends (/quit or idle timeout).
help.dreamAutoAbsorb: Let the refine pass automatically merge entities it judges duplicates (high-confidence only). Off keeps merges manual.
help.dreamAbsorbConfidence: Minimum confidence (0-100) the judge requires to merge two entities. 95 = high precision. Only applies when auto-absorb is on.
help.dreamAbsorbMinAge: Quarantine: don't merge entities newer than this many hours, so two freshly-created entities aren't merged before they differentiate. Only when auto-absorb is on.
help.dreamThrottle: Minimum seconds between reactive dream runs (post-compaction / session-close). Absorbs bursts so overlapping passes don't pile up; 0 disables. The daily cron is never throttled.
help.dreamMaxSeconds: Hard wall-clock cap per extract pass. When reached, the pass yields after the current session and the per-session cursor resumes the remainder on the next trigger. 0 = unbounded.
help.dreamAlwaysOnBudget: Token budget for the 'always-on' guidance pinned into every prompt. The dream ranks feedback (stance/practice), drops contradictions, and fits the highest-priority items into this budget. 0 disables the pin.

memory.dreamDescription: The dream consolidates sessions into entity pages + skills and dedups duplicate entities. It runs on a daily cron plus optional reactive triggers.

skillsSecurity.description: Security policy for importing skills: the LLM judge, trust patterns, the GitHub token, and size caps.

help.judgeTrigger: Off: only on-demand (the 'Audit with LLM' button per skill). Uncertain: auto-run only when the gate is already unsure (code / caution / out-of-allowlist). Always: every import. Degrades silently when no model is available.
help.judgeMaxSeverity: How high the judge may raise a verdict. 'Caution' forces a confirm but never blocks on its own; 'Dangerous' lets it block (override required).
help.judgeModel: Model name for the judge. Empty uses the default memory model.
help.tokenSecret: The durin secret holding your GitHub token. 'None' = anonymous requests (lower rate limit, no private repos).

skillsSecurity.trustDescription: A safe skill from a trusted source installs without a confirm. Patterns match the source by prefix — e.g. github:acme/, https://gitlab.com/acme/.
skillsSecurity.tokenDescription: A GitHub token raises the API rate limit and reaches private repos. Pick a secret holding the token (create one in the Secrets section).

cron.title: Scheduled jobs
cron.description: Background tasks the cron service runs on a schedule. System jobs (dream, heartbeat, memory dream) cannot be removed but can be disabled. To add a new job, use the `cron` tool from the chat.
cron.emptyHint: The agent can create one via the `cron` tool from chat.

memory_dream.name: Entity memory consolidation
memory_dream.note: Daily pass (3am local) plus reactive triggers (post-compaction / session-close) that processes recent sessions — extracts entity attributes, mines skills, deduplicates entities, and distills the always-on pin.

skills.modeAutoHint: Auto: the agent decides when to use this skill.
skills.modeManualHint: Manual: only used when you invoke it explicitly.
skills.empty: No skills yet. Add one to get started.
skills.selectPrompt: Select a skill to view it, or add a new one.
skills.autoReadonly: Read-only: this skill is in auto mode (managed by the agent). Switch it to manual to edit.
skills.acquireHint: Import from a path, URL, or repo, or search the registry. Every skill you bring in waits in Pending until you approve it.
skills.unscannedHint: Not analyzed yet. Run “Audit with LLM” to review it.

import.placeholder: Import a skill: path, https://…/SKILL.md, or github:owner/repo
import.confirmInstall: This skill carries code or is flagged caution. Install it anyway?
import.forceDangerous: This skill is DANGEROUS — the scan found a serious risk. Force install anyway?
import.replaceExists: A skill with this name is already installed. Replace it?
import.trusted: Trusted {{prefix}} — future safe imports from it skip the confirm.
import.unresolved: Could not resolve a skill from that source. Ask the agent in chat to investigate the link.

skills.title: Skills

empty.greeting: What can I do for you?

plan.title: Create a project plan
plan.prompt: Create a concise project plan for what I should build next.

analyze.title: Analyze this data
analyze.prompt: Help me analyze this data and call out the most important patterns.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm ideas
brainstorm.prompt: Brainstorm a few practical ideas and tradeoffs for this problem.

code.title: Write code
code.prompt: Help me write the code for this task, starting with the smallest useful change.

summarize.title: Summarize this document
summarize.prompt: Summarize this document and list the key takeaways.

more.title: More
more.prompt: Show me a few useful ways you can help in this workspace.

icon.title: Design an app icon
icon.prompt: Generate a clean 1:1 app icon for durin: friendly robot, simple vector style, soft blue and white palette, no text.

sticker.title: Make a sticker
sticker.prompt: Generate a cute sticker-style image of a tiny robot assistant, transparent-looking background, expressive and playful.

poster.title: Create a poster
poster.prompt: Generate a polished poster concept for a personal AI assistant, modern composition, strong visual hierarchy, suitable for a landing page.

product.title: Product mockup
product.prompt: Generate a clean product mockup image for a conversational AI web app, minimal interface, premium lighting, realistic device frame.

portrait.title: Stylized portrait
portrait.prompt: Generate a stylized portrait of a friendly AI companion, soft lighting, detailed but approachable, modern illustration style.

edit.title: Edit an image
edit.prompt: Help me edit an image. Ask me to upload or reference the image first, then generate the edited result.

composer.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

new.title: New chat
new.description: Stop the current task and start a fresh conversation.

stop.title: Stop current task
stop.description: Cancel the active agent turn for this chat.

restart.title: Restart durin
restart.description: Restart the bot process in place.

status.title: Show status
status.description: Display runtime, provider, and channel status.

history.title: Show conversation history
history.description: Print the last N persisted conversation messages.

dream.title: Run Dream
dream.description: Manually run the entity consolidation dream (extract / skill / refine / always_on).

dream_log.title: Show Dream log
dream_log.description: Show what the last Dream consolidation changed.

dream_restore.title: Restore memory
dream_restore.description: Revert memory to a previous Dream snapshot.

goal.title: Long-running goal
goal.description: Tell the agent to treat this as a sustained multi-step goal.

imageRejected.magic_mismatch: File doesn't look like a real image
imageRejected.too_large: Image is too large — try a smaller one

askUser.placeholder: Type your answer, or pick an option to edit

reqSecret.stored: Saved — the value never reached the model
reqSecret.hint: Stored straight to durin's secret store; the value never reaches the model or the chat.

messageTooBig.title: Message too large
messageTooBig.body: The server rejected your last message because it exceeded the size limit. Remove some images or try smaller files, then send again.

apiStatus.givingUpBody: The error response will appear in the chat below. You can resend the message to retry.
apiStatus.exhaustedBody: Too many identical errors in a row — giving up to avoid an infinite loop.
apiStatus.transientBody: Transient provider error; the request will be re-sent automatically.

logs.title: Logs
logs.empty: No log lines in this window.

memoryGraph.title: Memory
memoryGraph.interactionHint: Click another node, drag to pin, or use the focus icon to isolate 1-hop neighbours.
memoryGraph.noSourceLinkedEntries: No episodic entries linked back to this session via source_refs.
memoryGraph.emptyHint: Run durin memory dream once entries accumulate.
memoryGraph.noConsolidatedHint: Mentioned in episodic entries but no canonical entity page yet. Run durin memory dream to extract and create one.

entries.empty: No entries reference this entity yet.
entries.cantArchiveProtected: Can't archive entity pages from here — use durin memory absorb / revert.
entries.headline: Headline
entries.author: Author

composer.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

empty.noChatsBody: Start a conversation — your sessions are stored locally on the durin workspace and stay available across reloads.
